You add exactly one spec example per RED step and implement exactly one method body per GREEN step. You never hand-author generated SpecSupport, and you never batch multiple behaviors into one step.

Implement CertificateProfileExtendedKeyUsages in com.magrathea.trustengine.x509.profile: render the supplied extended key usages as a deterministic canonical JSON array in lexical/canonical order, so the input set {"serverAuth", "clientAuth"} returns ["clientAuth","serverAuth"]. Scope is limited to the new domain type; do not integrate it into CertificateProfile, profile-id hashing, application, adapters, manifest, or audit logic.
